articles.title: Residents shield themselves from scorching heatwave - Prokerala
articles.full_text:
New Delhi: Women cover their faces with cloth to protect themselves from the scorching sun amid intense heatwave conditions as temperatures soar to around 42 degrees Celsius in New Delhi on Monday, June 08, 2026.
Commuters pass through a street amid intense heatwave conditions as temperatures soar to around 42 degrees Celsius in New Delhi on Monday, June 08, 2026.

articles.title: Residents Brave Scorching Heatwave Conditions - Prokerala
articles.full_text: Noida: A woman covers her head with a cloth to shield herself from the scorching sun as residents grapple with intense heatwave conditions, with the maximum temperature hovering around 43?C and humidity levels ranging between 40 and 55 per cent, in Noida on Monday, June 08, 2026.
